description: SaaS newsletter platform — 0% commission, native SEO, AI writing assistant

features.name: publishing
features.title: Publishing — Rich text editor, autosave (30s), preview, schedule, send
features.notes: Completed. Full SPARC lifecycle. Key fixes: BATCH_SIZE 500 (Postmark limit), addBulk() for queue, nested Prisma analytics (avoids 100k UUID IN clause), UTC datetime fix, nullable scheduled_at, delete error feedback, public slug endpoint, published_at set on send.

features.name: subscriber-management
features.title: Subscriber Management — Email signup, double opt-in, list management
features.notes: Completed. Double opt-in flow, HMAC unsubscribe tokens, BullMQ email-confirmation worker. 5 major issues fixed in Phase 4 review.

features.name: paid-subscriptions
features.title: Paid Subscriptions — Stripe Checkout, 0% platform commission, past_due handling
features.notes: Critical risk: Stripe unavailable for RU entity. Need non-RU entity (Cyprus/UAE) first. Add stripe_event_id deduplication before production.

features.name: seo-native-posts
features.title: SEO-Native Posts — Next.js ISR, auto meta/OG/Twitter/Article schema, sitemap
features.notes: Can be implemented in parallel with F1 publishing (different package: apps/web only).

features.name: analytics
features.title: Analytics — Open rate, click rate, subscriber growth, revenue dashboard
features.notes: Requires sent posts (F1) and subscribers (F2). Last MVP feature — implement after revenue path.

features.name: substack-import
features.title: Substack Import — ZIP upload, CSV parse, free/paid mapping, deduplication
features.notes: Migration tool — important for Substack authors. Add ZIP bomb protection before production. Async via BullMQ worker.

features.name: ai-writing-assistant
features.title: AI Writing Assistant — Claude API draft generation, 10/hr rate limit per author
features.notes: Uses claude-sonnet-4-6 via MCP. Redis rate limit: 10/hr per author (TOCTOU issue — use SET NX with TTL).

features.name: cross-publication-recommendations
features.title: Cross-Publication Recommendations — Opt-in recommendation network
features.notes: PRD feature F8. Network effect feature — more valuable as platform grows.

features.name: multi-stream-monetization
features.title: Multi-stream Monetization — Ad placements, digital products, tip jar
features.notes: Extension of Stripe integration from F3.
